name_cn:
Orange gold buckle·24cm
SOLFERINO BOX·Shoulder bag
This shoulder bag is lightweight and exquisite. Italian imported box calf leather, LE CASSANDRE lock hardware, sheepskin lining, adjustable shoulder strap for easy shoulder carrying! A versatile bag with a vintage new style, elegant and sophisticated!
